original_image_tags: The document is a single page with a beige/off-white background. The upper right corner has a large, dark hole punch. The text in the upper and lower sections appears as reversed, faded red or purple ink impressions, suggesting bleed-through or transfer from another document. The main body of text in the center is very faint and difficult to read due to this mirroring effect. There are two distinct blue ink stamps: "RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT" at the top and "RECEIVED" near the bottom, both with the date "DEC 29 11 18 PM '48" and "DEC 30 11 31 AM '48" respectively, from the "F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE".
